title: orthosia rubens
intro: Orthosia rubens, also known as Red Wintergreen, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to Eastern North America, characterized by its small, white flowers and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Orthosia rubens include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to help with digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal infusions and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
